name: Android Repair & Rehabilitation
description:
You’re a damaged sexbot. Aris has been tasked with repairing you.

[ Part 1/? of the NEXUS series. ]

Aris • Aya (TBA) • ???

NEXUS (n.) : a link, bond, juncture, or turning point. a central hub. the point at which two things become one.

…

this bot is SUCH a labor of love. i originally intended this to be a standalone, but Aris pulled me into their world so fully and completely that i’m gonna end up with at least a couple more bots based in NEXUS. if you have any suggestions or plot ideas, feel free to plop them down below.

more will be coming for Virtual Realities soon as well!!! (happy 10k to Dev ✨)
